payload.answer: Saved the URL as a bookmark with the provided reason, but did not extract article content because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404 network error, so no article entities or claims were resolved.

memory_cards.statement: The user wants to remember the URL https://example.com/missing because it may be useful for memory architecture.

details: Committed only the explicitly provided URL and reason.
No article claims were extracted because the URL fetch failed.
